vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is in a state of severe degradation. The registry is largely non-representative of the current physical state.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: The Pothos and the white rabbit anchor are no longer visible in the current frame.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter.

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty soil surface. No signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot: Empty soil surface. No signs of Mexican Mint.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: The anchor (rabbit) has been removed or obscured. The Pothos is absent.
plant_audit.P4_Shared_Black_Pot: Contains only debris (eggshell fragments). No plant life.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears dry and compacted across all visible pots.
biome_observations.debris: Significant presence of crushed eggshells in the black pot, serving as an uncatalogued soil amendment or waste.

temporal_deltas.Earliest_to_T-2: Gradual decline of the single visible leaf in the black pot; loss of structural integrity.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_Current: Total disappearance of the remaining leaf and the rabbit anchor. The biome has transitioned from a struggling state to a state of total vacancy.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. All specimens have either been removed, died, or withered beyond recognition. The environment is now essentially a collection of empty containers.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at soil enrichment that failed to sustain the specimens. The removal of the rabbit anchor indicates a deliberate intervention or clearing of the desk space.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic loss of the botanical collection. Over the observed period, the plants have progressively vanished. The final state shows empty pots and a lack of any biological activity, suggesting the desk has been cleared or the plants have perished and been removed.
